ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-26-2017 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. There being no appearance nor response to the OSC and Notice of Impending Discretionary Dismissal having been given, the Court ordered matter dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608 (b). Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-19-2016 Continued To Jan-24-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to JAN-24-2017 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. *** NOTICE: Impending Discretionary Dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). *** JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes. Proceedings not reported. (610)
